No Poverty.reason: No direct evidence in the syllabus relates to poverty eradication, social protection, or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct evidence in the syllabus relates to hunger, food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct evidence in the syllabus relates to health outcomes, disease prevention, or access to healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops professional knowledge, teamwork, and leadership skills for employment and entrepreneurship (Target 4.4).
evidence: 習得相關進階專業知識（Students will acquire and apply expertise in their respective fields.）

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct evidence in the syllabus relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

evidence: 理解與辨別商業環境中道德、社會責任與永續議題（Students will understand and be able to identify the ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability considerations of business situations.）

Life Below Water.reason: No direct evidence in the syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, ocean pollution, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No direct evidence in the syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or deforestation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Developing leadership and building '共識願景' (consensus vision) supports effective institutions (Target 16.6) and participatory decision-making (Target 16.7).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's core focus on '團隊合作' (teamwork) and building a '對話分享社群' (dialogue and sharing community) directly supports partnerships (Targets 17.16, 17.17).
